---
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---
# Demographics variables {#demo}
##Demographic Collection Form 


```{r, echo=FALSE, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)
library(shiny)
library(fontawesome)
library(readxl)

comparison1 <- read_xlsx("Codebook/comparison_codebook.xlsx")

```

```{css, echo=FALSE}
.badge {
  display:inline-block;
  padding:4px 8px;
  border-radius:8px;
  color:white;
  font-size:12px;
  font-weight:bold;
  margin-right:4px;
}
.badge.maxed { background:#FF922B; }
.badge.mr21  { background:#339AF0; }

.toggle-btn {
  padding:8px 14px;
  border-radius:6px;
  border:none;
  margin-right:6px;
  color:white;
  font-weight:bold;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.btn-shared { background:#2ECC71; }
.btn-maxed  { background:#FF922B; }
.btn-mr21   { background:#339AF0; }

table.dataTable tbody tr:nth-child(even){ background:#f7f9fc; }
table.dataTable tbody tr:nth-child(odd) { background:#ffffff; }
table.dataTable tbody tr:hover{ background:#e6f2ff; }


```

Demographic Variables

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}

# ----------------------------------------------------
# LOAD CODEBOOKS
# ----------------------------------------------------
maxed <- read.csv("Codebook/codebook.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
mr21  <- read.csv("codebook/mr21_codebook.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

DATA_FORM <- "data_collection_form"

maxed_demo <- maxed %>% filter(Form.Name == DATA_FORM)
mr21_demo  <- mr21  %>% filter(Form.Name == DATA_FORM)

# ----------------------------------------------------
# TAGS & ICONS
# ----------------------------------------------------
tag_maxed <- "<span class='badge maxed'>MAXED</span>"
tag_mr21  <- "<span class='badge mr21'>MR21</span>"

icon_shared   <- as.character(fa("check-circle", fill = "#2ECC71"))
icon_unique_x <- as.character(fa("times-circle", fill = "#E74C3C"))

# ----------------------------------------------------
# MERGE CODEBOOK VARIABLES
# ----------------------------------------------------
all_vars <- union(maxed_demo$Variable...Field.Name, mr21_demo$Variable...Field.Name)

comparison <- data.frame(Variable = all_vars) %>% 
  left_join(
    maxed_demo %>% select(
      Variable = Variable...Field.Name,
      label_maxed  = `Field.Label`,
      values_maxed = `Choices..Calculations..OR.Slider.Labels`
    ),
    by = "Variable"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    mr21_demo %>% select(
      Variable = Variable...Field.Name,
      label_mr21  = `Field.Label`,
      values_mr21 = `Choices..Calculations..OR.Slider.Labels`
    ),
    by = "Variable"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Project = case_when(
      !is.na(label_maxed) & !is.na(label_mr21) ~ paste(tag_maxed, tag_mr21),
      !is.na(label_maxed) ~ tag_maxed,
      !is.na(label_mr21) ~ tag_mr21
    ),
    Status = case_when(
      !is.na(label_maxed) & !is.na(label_mr21) ~ icon_shared,
      TRUE ~ icon_unique_x
    ),
    Filter = case_when(
      !is.na(label_maxed) & !is.na(label_mr21) ~ "shared",
      !is.na(label_maxed) ~ "maxed",
      !is.na(label_mr21) ~ "mr21"
    )
  )


#save comparison table for use in other Rmd files


# ----------------------------------------------------
# TOGGLE BUTTONS
# ----------------------------------------------------
toggle_html <- HTML("
<div style='margin-bottom:10px;'>
<button class='toggle-btn btn-shared' onclick=\"filterTable('shared')\">Shared</button>
<button class='toggle-btn btn-maxed' onclick=\"filterTable('maxed')\">MAXED</button>
<button class='toggle-btn btn-mr21' onclick=\"filterTable('mr21')\">MR21</button>
</div>

<script>
function filterTable(category){
  var table = $('#comparison_table').DataTable();
  if(category === 'all'){
    table.column(7).search('').draw();
  } else {
    table.column(7).search(category).draw();
  }
}
</script>
")

# ----------------------------------------------------
# DATATABLE (FULL WIDTH + SCROLLABLE)
# ----------------------------------------------------
tbl <- htmltools::div(style = "width: 100%; overflow-x: auto;",
  datatable(
    comparison %>%
      select(Status, Project, Variable, label_maxed, values_maxed, label_mr21, values_mr21, Filter),
    escape = FALSE,
    rownames = FALSE,
    filter = "top",
    options = list(
      dom = "Bfrtip",
      buttons = c("csv"),
      pageLength = 20,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      autoWidth = TRUE,
      columnDefs = list(
        list(visible = FALSE, targets = 7),
        list(width = "60px",  targets = 0),  # Status
        list(width = "180px", targets = 1), # Project
        list(width = "250px", targets = 2)  # Variable
      )
    ),
    container = tags$table(id = "comparison_table")
  )
)

# ----------------------------------------------------
# COLLAPSIBLE SECTION
# ----------------------------------------------------
htmltools::tagList(
  HTML("<details><summary><strong>DCF Variables</strong></summary>"),
  toggle_html,
  tbl,
  HTML("</details>")
)


```

#Anthrometropretic Measures {#weight}

```{r}
weight_measures <- comparison1 |> 
  #filter for bmi measures and height measure in label
  filter(grepl("bmi|height", Label, ignore.case = TRUE)) |> 
   mutate(
    Project = case_when(
      In_MAXED ==TRUE & In_MR21 ==TRUE ~ paste(tag_maxed, tag_mr21),
      In_MAXED == TRUE ~ tag_maxed,
      In_MR21 == TRUE ~ tag_mr21))

# ----------------------------------------------------
# TOGGLE BUTTONS
# ----------------------------------------------------
toggle_html1 <- HTML("
<div style='margin-bottom:10px;'>
<button class='toggle-btn btn-shared' onclick=\"filterTable('shared')\">Shared</button>
<button class='toggle-btn btn-maxed' onclick=\"filterTable('maxed')\">MAXED</button>
<button class='toggle-btn btn-mr21' onclick=\"filterTable('mr21')\">MR21</button>
</div>

<script>
function filterTable(category){
  var table = $('#weight_measures').DataTable();
  if(category === 'all'){
    table.column(5).search('').draw();
  } else {
    table.column(5).search(category).draw();
  }
}
</script>
")

# ----------------------------------------------------
# DATATABLE (FULL WIDTH + SCROLLABLE)
# ----------------------------------------------------
tbl_anthro <- htmltools::div(style = "width: 100%; overflow-x: auto;",
  datatable(
    weight_measures %>%
      select(ProjectTag, Variable, Label, In_MAXED, In_MR21, VarFilter),
    escape = FALSE,
    rownames = FALSE,
    filter = "top",
    options = list(
      dom = "Bfrtip",
      buttons = c("csv"),
      pageLength = 20,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      autoWidth = TRUE,
      columnDefs = list(
        list(visible = FALSE, targets = 5),
        list(width = "60px",  targets = 1),  # Status
        list(width = "180px", targets = 2), # Project
        list(width = "250px", targets = 3)  # Variable
      )
    ),
    container = tags$table(id = "weight_measures")
  )
)

# ----------------------------------------------------
# COLLAPSIBLE SECTION
# ----------------------------------------------------
htmltools::tagList(
  HTML("<details><summary><strong> Anthropometric
       Variables </strong></summary>"),
  toggle_html1,
  tbl_anthro,
  HTML("</details>")
  )

```
